mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE cooperation_status = 'cooperating') AS cooperating, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE health_level_cache = 'high_risk') AS high_risk, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE health_level_cache = 'attention') AS attention, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE health_level_cache = 'low_risk') AS low_risk, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE health_score_cache IS NULL) AS unscored, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM risk_event WHERE status IN ('open','confirmed','processing')) AS pending, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM risk_event WHERE triggered_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS new_7d FROM supplier

SELECT COALESCE(health_level_cache, 'unscored') AS level, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supplier), 0), 1) AS percentage FROM supplier GROUP BY COALESCE(health_level_cache, 'unscored') ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT re.risk_dimension AS dimension, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE re.status IN ('open','confirmed','processing')) AS open_count, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(s.health_score_cache), 0)::numeric, 1) AS avg_score FROM risk_event re INNER JOIN supplier s ON s.id = re.supplier_id GROUP BY re.risk_dimension ORDER BY open_count DESC

SELECT gs.day::date AS date, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN shs.health_level = 'high_risk' THEN shs.supplier_id END) AS high_risk_count, COUNT(DISTINCT re.id) AS new_events FROM generate_series( CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '13 days', CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1 day' ) AS gs(day) LEFT JOIN supplier_health_snapshot shs ON shs.snapshot_date = gs.day::date LEFT JOIN risk_event re ON re.triggered_at::date = gs.day::date GROUP BY gs.day ORDER BY gs.day

SELECT s.id, s.name, s.health_score_cache AS health_score, s.health_level_cache AS health_level, TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(s.region_province,''), ' ', COALESCE(s.region_city,''))) AS region, s.week_trend_cache AS week_trend, (SELECT re2.risk_dimension FROM risk_event re2 WHERE re2.supplier_id = s.id AND re2.status IN ('open','confirmed','processing') GROUP BY re2.risk_dimension ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) AS top_dimension, COUNT(re.id) FILTER (WHERE re.status IN ('open','confirmed','processing')) AS open_events FROM supplier s LEFT JOIN risk_event re ON re.supplier_id = s.id WHERE s.cooperation_status = 'cooperating' AND s.health_level_cache IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.health_score_cache, s.health_level_cache, s.region_province, s.region_city, s.week_trend_cache ORDER BY s.health_score_cache ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

SELECT re.id, re.supplier_id AS supplier_id, s.name AS supplier_name, re.risk_dimension AS risk_dimension, re.description, re.status, re.triggered_at AS triggered_at FROM risk_event re INNER JOIN supplier s ON s.id = re.supplier_id ORDER BY re.triggered_at DESC LIMIT 10
